title: About Nayab Tahir
excerpt: Registered Psychotherapist in Ontario — MACP, cross-cultural expertise, trauma-informed care.
body:
I am pleased to present myself as a dedicated psychotherapist based in Canada. A unique combination of qualifications — a **Master's degree in Counselling Psychology (MACP)** from Yorkville University, a **Bachelor of Arts in Psychology**, and a **Bachelor of Science in Pharmacy** — enables me to understand and address psychological issues at a clinical level.

I have diverse cross-cultural life experiences by virtue of living in five countries and nurturing human relationships across multiple ethnicities. This rich blend of education and personal journey has shaped my understanding of people's challenges across diverse communities.

These experiences have highlighted the pervasive stigma around mental health in many communities. **My passion lies in breaking down this stigma** and offering support to those who feel lost or in need.

Through [Voice Awareness Psychotherapy Services Inc.](https://www.voiceawareness.ca), I offer psychotherapy and counseling for adults navigating anxiety, trauma, emotional overwhelm, relationship challenges, and life transitions. Services are individualized, collaborative, and grounded in evidence-based, trauma-informed care.

### Professional profiles
